Bob Martinez

Summary:
Full-stack developer with 4 years of experience in Python and JavaScript. Enjoys building end-to-end web applications.

Experience:

Full Stack Developer — WebWorks Agency (2020–Present)
- Built full-stack applications using Django and React
- Designed REST APIs consumed by mobile and web clients
- Created PostgreSQL schemas and wrote complex SQL queries
- Deployed applications on AWS EC2 with Docker
- Participated in agile sprints and code reviews

Junior Developer — StartupXYZ (2019–2020)
- Developed features using Python and Flask
- Wrote unit tests with pytest
- Used Git for version control and collaboration

Education:
B.S. Computer Science, University of Texas at Austin (2019)

Skills:
Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Django, Flask, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS, Git, REST API, HTML, CSS, Agile
